creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Comment on attachment 194515
Updated shell archive of games/segs ports submission

All the libQt5* in LIB_DEPENDS and qt5-* SEGS_DEPENDS are already implied
by USE_QT5.

Note that USE_QT5 has also been renamed to USE_QT.  See the Porter's
Handbook [1] on how to migrate to it.

Please also confirm that this passes portlint and a Poudriere testport.

[1] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/using-qt.html
